title: You Be Profen
about: You Be Profen, also known as You Be What? You Be Profen? is a quote from an animation by DiEM (DiemArchive) in which the character Ragebait Goblin is granted a wish from a genie and chooses to change the word "gooning" to "profen." He then makes the genie read "Ibuprofen," the over-the-counter pain medication, which sounds like "I be profen." The goblin then laughs with his tongue out and middle finger up and says, "You be what? You be profen?" with the joke being that "profen" now means "gooning." The animation was originally posted to YouTube, Instagram and TikTok in August 2025, inspiring animation memes and other jokes over the following months.
origin:
On August 14th, 2025, DiEM, also known as DiemArchive, uploaded an animation to YouTube,[1] titled "He be Profen his Geenie." In the video, a character called "Ragebait Goblin" ragebaits a genie by wishing for the word "gooning" to be changed to "profen." The goblin then asks the genie to read, "Ibuprofen," off a bottle, which sounds like "I be profen" when orated. The goblin then laughs with his tongue out and middle finger up and says, "You be what? You be profen?" Over two months, the video received roughly 274,800 views and 17,000 likes.

DiEM also posted the video to their Instagram[2] account @diemarchive on August 14th, where it received over 14.7 million views and 1.3 million likes in two months.

The animation was also posted to DiEM's TikTok[3] account @diemarchive on that same day, gaining over 11 million plays and 1.8 million likes over the same timeframe.
